From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

1959 studio album by Bud Shank

| Latin Contrasts | |
| --- | --- |
|  | |
| [Studio album](/wiki/Album "Album") by [Bud Shank](/wiki/Bud_Shank "Bud Shank") | |
| Released | 1959 |
| Recorded | March 1958 [Radio Recorders](/wiki/Radio_Recorders "Radio Recorders"), Los Angeles, CA |
| [Genre](/wiki/Music_genre "Music genre") | [Jazz](/wiki/Jazz "Jazz") |
| [Label](/wiki/Record_label "Record label") | [World Pacific](/wiki/Pacific_Jazz_Records "Pacific Jazz Records") WP 1281 |
| [Producer](/wiki/Record_producer "Record producer") | Richard Bock |
| [Bud Shank](/wiki/Bud_Shank "Bud Shank") chronology | |
| |  |  |  | | --- | --- | --- | | *[Holiday in Brazil](/wiki/Holiday_in_Brazil "Holiday in Brazil")* (1958) | ***Latin Contrasts*** (1959) | *[I'll Take Romance](/wiki/I%27ll_Take_Romance "I'll Take Romance")* (1958) | | |

***Latin Contrasts*** (also released as ***Brazilliance Vol. 3***) is an album by saxophonist [Bud Shank](/wiki/Bud_Shank "Bud Shank") with arrangements by [Laurindo Almeida](/wiki/Laurindo_Almeida "Laurindo Almeida") first released on the [World Pacific](/wiki/Pacific_Jazz_Records "Pacific Jazz Records") label in 1959.[[1]](#cite_note-1)[[2]](#cite_note-2)

## Reception

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Latin_Contrasts&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: Reception")]

Professional ratings

| Review scores | |
| --- | --- |
| Source | Rating |
| [AllMusic](/wiki/AllMusic "AllMusic") | StarStarStar[[3]](#cite_note-AllMusic-3) |

[AllMusic](/wiki/AllMusic "AllMusic") rated the album with 3 stars.[[3]](#cite_note-AllMusic-3)

## Track listing

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Latin_Contrasts&action=edit&section=2 "Edit section: Track listing")]

*All compositions by Laurindo Almeida, except as indicated.*

1. "Harlem Samba" - 2:26
2. "North of the Border" - 2:38
3. "Sunset Baion" - 2:04
4. "['Round About Midnight](/wiki/%27Round_Midnight_(song) "'Round Midnight (song)")" ([Thelonious Monk](/wiki/Thelonious_Monk "Thelonious Monk"), [Bernie Hanighen](/wiki/Bernie_Hanighen "Bernie Hanighen"), [Cootie Williams](/wiki/Cootie_Williams "Cootie Williams")) - 3:54
5. "Toro Dance" (Bud Shank) - 2:52
6. "Serenade for Alto" - 3:35
7. "Xana-Lyn" (Shank) - 3:28
8. "Blowing Wild" ([Dmitri Tiomkin](/wiki/Dmitri_Tiomkin "Dmitri Tiomkin"), [Paul Francis Webster](/wiki/Paul_Francis_Webster "Paul Francis Webster")) - 3:30
9. "Gershwin Prelude" ([George Gershwin](/wiki/George_Gershwin "George Gershwin")) - 3:28
10. "Frio Y Color" (Shank) - 3:20

## Personnel

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Latin_Contrasts&action=edit&section=3 "Edit section: Personnel")]

* [Bud Shank](/wiki/Bud_Shank "Bud Shank") - [alto saxophone](/wiki/Alto_saxophone "Alto saxophone"), [flute](/wiki/Flute "Flute")
* [Laurindo Almeida](/wiki/Laurindo_Almeida "Laurindo Almeida") - [guitar](/wiki/Guitar "Guitar")
* [Gary Peacock](/wiki/Gary_Peacock "Gary Peacock") - [bass](/wiki/Double_bass "Double bass")
* [Chuck Flores](/wiki/Chuck_Flores "Chuck Flores") - [drums](/wiki/Drum_kit "Drum kit")
